commanders.name: Jorn, God of Winter // Kaldring, the Rimestaff
Kefka, Court Mage // Kefka, Ruler of Ruin
Starscream, Power Hungry // Starscream, Seeker Leader

games.notes: Everyone ganged up on Pertman so he didn’t get a hat trick. Margolis played a good game

triggeredAchievements.description: Win a game after going last.
triggeredAchievements.title: Come From Behind

games.notes: Noah was more honorable than ever. He flashed his cards and reminded the table that Margolis gained 25 life. Pertman did yell “wait” many times on someone else’s turn. Pertman dropped his deck while shuffling

triggeredAchievements.description: Drop your cards on the floor.
triggeredAchievements.title: Oops, Butterfingers

triggeredAchievements.description: Pertman yells "wait" after his turn more than once in a single game.
triggeredAchievements.title: WAIT!

games.notes: Jake was a pacifist. Noah cheated by accident, but was honorable and walked it back. Pertman’s boardwipe won him the game

triggeredAchievements.description: Play an entire game without attacking another player.
triggeredAchievements.title: Pacifist

games.notes: Jake wished for “Sora and Donald Fuck”. Pertman killed himself to enjoy the sweet release of death and sleep. Matthew woke up and absolutely ruined the end of the game

triggeredAchievements.description: Win a game after going last.
triggeredAchievements.title: Come From Behind

triggeredAchievements.description: Matthew wakes up and ruins the last game of the evening.
triggeredAchievements.title: 404 Error: Thumb Not Found

games.notes: Justin swung 12 rat damage at Pertman and punished him with his own haste. Justin will play “Swiftfoot boats”. Noah believed in the heart of the dice and absolutely shit the bed
Jake did choose to discard a Teferi’s Protection, which was very honorable. Justin rankled nonstop, forcing everyone to constantly sacrifice creatures
Hat trick for Jake. Matthew woke up and ruined the end of the game

triggeredAchievements.description: Win a game after going last.
triggeredAchievements.title: Come From Behind

triggeredAchievements.description: Matthew wakes up and ruins the last game of the evening.
triggeredAchievements.title: 404 Error: Thumb Not Found

games.notes: Jake’s opening turn he played a land into a sol ring into an arcane signet. The other two never stood a chance. Justin loves to skullclamp his rats

triggeredAchievements.description: Win a game after going last.
triggeredAchievements.title: Come From Behind

games.notes: Jake had his way with everyone. Noah thought he was going to win on turn 4 but was sorely mistaken
Josh punted the game via oversimplification. Josh jumpscared many times. Max copied Tinybones. We listened to ABBA

triggeredAchievements.description: Win a game after going first.
triggeredAchievements.title: First Blood

triggeredAchievements.description: Max graces the table with their presence.
triggeredAchievements.title: Look What the Zeus Dragged In

games.notes: Justin skullclamped his rats and was really tickled. Italian Justin sucessfully brought out every rat with his thrumming stone. He fumbled terribly by not attacking and killing Jake and Noah. In the end (roughly an hour later) he was victorious

triggeredAchievements.description: Win a game after going first.
triggeredAchievements.title: First Blood

participants.commanderName: Jorn, God of Winter // Kaldring, the Rimestaff
Kefka, Court Mage // Kefka, Ruler of Ruin

games.notes: Jake grasp of fated Noah’s grasp of fate. Noah destroyed Jake’s grasp of fate to do another grasp of fate. Noah copied a grasp of fate three more times
Pertman cheats in his own home

triggeredAchievements.description: Win a game after going first.
triggeredAchievements.title: First Blood

games.notes: Pertman was only trying to get the achievement, and he succeeded
Pertman cheated the entire game saying his arcane signet was a sol ring

triggeredAchievements.description: Max graces the table with their presence.
triggeredAchievements.title: Look What the Zeus Dragged In

games.notes: Justin was able to play Thrumming Stone and get all of his rats out, but it was far too late

participants.commanderName: Starscream, Power Hungry // Starscream, Seeker Leader

games.notes: Noah almost won with Triskaidekaphile but Margolis stopped it with a split-second spell that prevented anyone else from winning the game that turn
